name: Idaho vs Utah workers comp—which is better for my injury claim?

mainEntity.name: Idaho vs Utah workers comp—which is better for my injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: Similar no-fault systems; Utah 180-day report vs Idaho 60-day stricter; both ~66% wages.[1][3] Key factors: Utah managed care more, Idaho job not guaranteed post-injury.[3] Practical guidance: Check state rules where injured; benefits comparable but deadlines differ. Local attorney knows nuances.
